posts.author: hayley.white (Hayley)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I’d like to set a formula in a Numbers column, called “Days”.
If Priority = Critical then the Days column should display “1”
If Priority = High then Days = “2”
If Priority = Med then Days = 3
If Priority = Low then Days = 5

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Hayley! Happy to work with you on this

To start, I’d love to learn more about your current set up. To confirm, is the priority on the board being tracked with a Priority/Status column?

Also, I’d like to clarify that a formula would output this calculation to a Formula Column, it would not natively output this into a Numbers column.. With this in mind, does this work for your workflow our do these days need to be in a Numbers column?
